articles.title: USMNT vs. Australia score, live updates, where to watch: Christian Pulisic ruled out with calf injury, Ricardo Pepi takes his place in USA's World Cup lineup Friday - Yahoo Sports
articles.description: The U.S. and Australia both emerged with wins in their first games of the World Cup group stage.
articles.content: The USMNT could put themselves on the verge of taking Group D with a win over Australia. Both teams enter Friday's match with a win after the U.S. took care of Paraguay and Australia blanked Türkiye … [+5216 chars]

articles.author: Becky Sullivan
articles.title: The U.S. may face Australia in the World Cup without star Christian Pulisic - NPR
articles.description: The left winger Pulisic was key to the Americans' fluid and effective attack in last week's win over Paraguay. But he was kicked in the calf, left at halftime, and hasn't trained with the team since.
articles.content:
SEATTLE The performance of the U.S. men's national soccer team in Friday's match against Australia could come down to the health of star Christian Pulisic and specifically, his left calf.
